title: First Steps
description: Welcome to GridX! Your goal is to reach the door. Use the player.move() command.

title: Turning Corners
description: The door is hidden around the corner. You'll need to use different directions.

title: Express Delivery
description: The door is far! Use player.run() to move twice as fast in a single command.

title: Loop It
description: Repeating commands is boring. Use a for loop to write efficient code!

title: Obstacle Course
description: Navigate through the walls carefully! Combine loops and simple moves.

title: The Key to Success
description: The door is locked! You must stand on the key and use player.take('key'), then open the door.

title: Heavy Lifting
description: A heavy box blocks your path. Stand next to it and use player.push('box') to clear the way!

title: Pull it Back
description: Pushing won't work here! Turn around and use player.pull('box') to drag it backward.

title: Smart Navigation
description: You don't know where the wall is! Use canMove() inside if/else inside a loop.

title: Reusable Logic
description: Create a custom function staircase() that moves down then right, and call it multiple times.

title: The Collector's Puzzle
description: Combine your skills! Find a way to grab the key, push the box out of the way, and unlock the door.

title: Master of GridX
description: The ultimate challenge. Navigate walls, boxes, and locked doors to escape!
hint: Use functions to clean your code, avoid boxes blocking narrow paths, push boxes carefully and pick up the key!
